Title: Order cancellation policy
Body: Orders may be cancelled within 2 hours of placement if they have not entered processing.

Title: Gift card usage
Body: Gift cards can be redeemed during checkout and may be combined with promotional offers unless stated otherwise.

Title: International shipping
Body: We ship to select international destinations. Delivery times vary by country.

Title: Lost or damaged shipments
Body: Report lost or damaged shipments within 7 days of expected delivery for investigation.

Title: Subscription management
Body: Customers may modify or cancel subscriptions anytime through their account settings.

Title: Price matching policy
Body: We match competitor pricing on eligible products within 14 days of purchase.

Title: Customer support availability
Body: Support is available via chat, email, and phone Monday through Friday.

Title: Digital product delivery
Body: Digital products are delivered via email immediately after successful payment.

Title: Tax information
Body: Applicable sales taxes are calculated automatically based on shipping address.

Title: Accessibility commitment
Body: Our website follows accessibility best practices to improve usability for all customers.

Title: How to place an order
Body: Step 1: Browse products. Step 2: Add to cart. Step 3: Checkout and pay.

Title: Track your order
Body: Use the order number from your confirmation email to track your shipment in real-time.

Title: Return policy basics
Body: Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery in original condition for full refund.

Title: Shipping information
Body: Standard shipping: 3-7 business days. Express shipping: 1-2 business days. Free shipping over $50.

Title: Payment methods accepted
Body: We accept credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay for secure transactions.

Title: Account registration
Body: Create an account to save your addresses, view order history, and receive personalized recommendations.

Title: Product warranty details
Body: Electronics come with 1-year manufacturer warranty. Check product page for specific coverage details.

Title: How to apply a coupon
Body: Enter your coupon code at checkout before payment. Code appears in promotional emails or cart banners.

Title: Bulk order discounts
Body: Orders of 10+ identical items receive 10% discount automatically applied at checkout.

Title: Privacy and data protection
Body: We protect your data with encryption and never sell your information to third parties. GDPR compliant.
